statements.__comment: Cleanup: remove stale RESOLVED_IMAGE edges on :Container from previous runs.
statements.query: MATCH (:Container)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(:Image) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment: Create RESOLVED_IMAGE for containers by collecting concrete :Image candidates from direct HAS_IMAGE, architecture-matched ImageManifestList children, ImageTag -> Image, and ImageTag -> ImageManifestList -> CONTAINS_IMAGE paths. Only creates the edge when exactly one distinct concrete image candidate exists.
statements.query: MATCH (c:Container)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->() WITH DISTINCT c CALL { WITH c MATCH (c)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE NOT i:ImageManifestList RETURN i AS candidate UNION WITH c MATCH (c)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(:ImageManifestList)-[:CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE c.architecture_normalized IS NOT NULL AND i._ont_architecture = c.architecture_normalized RETURN i AS candidate UNION WITH c MATCH (c)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(:ImageTag)-[:IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE NOT i:ImageManifestList RETURN i AS candidate UNION WITH c MATCH (c)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(:ImageTag)-[:IMAGE]->(:ImageManifestList)-[:CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE c.architecture_normalized IS NOT NULL AND i._ont_architecture = c.architecture_normalized RETURN i AS candidate } WITH c, collect(DISTINCT candidate) AS candidates WHERE size(candidates) = 1 WITH c, candidates[0] AS img MERGE (c)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(img) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: Cleanup: remove stale RESOLVED_IMAGE edges on :Function from previous runs.
statements.query: MATCH (:Function)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(:Image) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment: Create RESOLVED_IMAGE for functions by collecting concrete :Image candidates from direct HAS_IMAGE, architecture-matched ImageManifestList children, ImageTag -> Image, and ImageTag -> ImageManifestList -> CONTAINS_IMAGE paths. Only creates the edge when exactly one distinct concrete image candidate exists.
statements.query: MATCH (f:Function)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->() WITH DISTINCT f CALL { WITH f MATCH (f)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE NOT i:ImageManifestList RETURN i AS candidate UNION WITH f MATCH (f)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(:ImageManifestList)-[:CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE f.architecture_normalized IS NOT NULL AND i._ont_architecture = f.architecture_normalized RETURN i AS candidate UNION WITH f MATCH (f)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(:ImageTag)-[:IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE NOT i:ImageManifestList RETURN i AS candidate UNION WITH f MATCH (f)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(:ImageTag)-[:IMAGE]->(:ImageManifestList)-[:CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE f.architecture_normalized IS NOT NULL AND i._ont_architecture = f.architecture_normalized RETURN i AS candidate } WITH f, collect(DISTINCT candidate) AS candidates WHERE size(candidates) = 1 WITH f, candidates[0] AS img MERGE (f)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(img) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG
